summary: PH: Recruiter can switch between tabs for candidate and agency comms
wiki:
h2. User story

*As a* recruiter
*I want* tabs to switch candidate vs agency email threads where applicable
*So that* I manage formal agency coordination (transcript: agency-heavy regions)

h2. Scenarios

h3. Scenario 1: Switch tabs preserves per-tab scroll where designed

*Given* both tabs visible
*When* I switch tabs
*Then* I see the correct thread for each relationship

h3. Scenario 2: Agency tab forbidden without entitlement

*Given* I lack agency entitlement
*When* I attempt agency tab
*Then* access is denied without exposing snippets

h3. Scenario 3: XSS in agency display name rejected

*Given* agency display name contains HTML
*When* I render tab label
*Then* content is escaped per security baseline

h2. Definition of Ready

||Criterion||Any blocking issues to being ready / Notes||
|We understand the value this work provides to customers and how it supports the product vision.| |
|We have clearly defined, understand, and agree on the Acceptance Criteria.| |
|We have no blocking open questions.| |
|There are no dependencies blocking completion.| |
|We agree on the Manual and Automation testing approach.| |
|We agree on the customer documentation impacts.| |
|We have relatively sized the Story.| |
|We can complete the Story according to our Workday Definition of Done in a sprint.| |
|We have documented our discussions and the key decision points.| |
|We have discussed toggles| |
